name: Dəfnə ağacı
overview: Three friends Tural, Kamran and Selim gather at home and eat and drink. Later, an argument breaks out between Kamran and Selim. As a result of the argument, Kamran stabs Selim to death. At this time, Tural is drunk and does not know anything, and Kamran, taking advantage of this, falsely tells Tural that he committed the crime, and all the events begin from there.
